evidence.claim: 4 years of experience building ML-powered features in production
evidence.source_text: Machine learning engineer with 4.0 years of experience building ML-powered features in production.

evidence.claim: De-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via learning-to-rank model
Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Designed relevance labeling pipeline, feature pipeline, and training/eval workflow
evidence.source_text: Designed the relevance labeling pipeline (mix of click-through data and explicit human judgments), the feature pipeline, and the training/eval workflow.

evidence.claim: Learns primarily through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Proficient in a wide range of ML tools and frameworks including Milvus, PyTorch, LangChain, and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Skills: Milvus... Computer Vision... Feature Engineering... Semantic Search... Diffusion Models... Elasticsearch... LangChain... Weaviate... Forecasting... Recommendation Systems... Vector Search... MLflow... Python... BentoML... PyTorch... FAISS... scikit-learn... PEFT

evidence.claim: Pragmatic approach to debugging production systems
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.
